title: The Great Flood
tmdbOverview: When a raging flood traps a researcher and her young son, a call to a crucial mission puts their escape — and the future of humanity — on the line.
synopsis: The Great Flood (2025) is a science fiction, adventure and drama film from South Korea. It has a 5.4 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
